text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A large group of students is training<n>together, but
my eyes gradually fall on<n>the lone figure
watching them from<n>afar.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Um, we're gonna do a group training<n>session
with everyone who's still<n>around...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: If you're interested, would you like to<n>join us?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Nope. Find someone else for your<n>games.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian turns down their offer so<n>harshly, I
can't help but wonder if<n>there's a reason she
doesn't want to<n>run with them...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
That day on my way home after<n>school, I see her
running on the track.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Then leave me alone. You're<n>distracting me.
choice_data_list: You just wanted to run on your own, huh?
You just wanted to run on your own, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Then leave me alone. You're<n>distracting me.
choice_data_list: You just wanted to run on your own, huh?
You just wanted to run on your own, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
No, duh. I always make sure to keep<n>my training
balanced.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Was that all you came here to say?<n>Can I get
back to training already?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian dismisses me curtly and<n>continues
running again.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch... So you saw, huh? Yeah, I focus<n>better
when I'm alone.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian runs off without a second<n>glance at
me.
